title: acalypha medibracteata var. calcicola
intro: Acalypha medibracteata var. calcicola, also known as the limestone acalypha, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha medibracteata var. calcicola include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as a natural diuretic and anti-histamine. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
